creator: xaa+fbsdbug@dohd.org
text:
I've added both the diff I've made to the script.orig file I have here. Should be the one from the ISO, but I'm not 100% sure due to messing when debugging :) So I've added the script file as well. The /usr/libexec/bsdinstaller/script file is what I have tested with a VM, and it installs my VM as intended.

It doesn't feel like the cleanest way to do it, especially the "zfs umount -a" part feels messy.
